source_pr.title: dev union
source_pr.body:
- support order by and limit in union 
- subselect support union
- handle different all/distinct union option

symptoms: {"select c1 from t1 union (select c2 from t2) order by c1", true}, (parser/parser_test.go)
failure_signature: {"select c1 from t1 union (select c2 from t2) order by c1", true}, (parser/parser_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: {"select c1 from t1 union (select c2 from t2) order by c1", true}, (parser/parser_test.go)
files: parser/parser.y, parser/parser_test.go, plan/plans/union.go, plan/plans/union_test.go, stmt/stmts/insert.go, stmt/stmts/insert_test.go, stmt/stmts/union.go, stmt/stmts/union_test.go
